title: Outcome Contract, Non-Goals, and Measures of Success · Product Forensics
summary: A preserved decision record for outcome contract, non-goals, and measures of success contains one plausible evidence, scope, design, implementation, evaluation, or ownership defect. Find the first unsupported claim before changing the product. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in measurable outcome and non-goal contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, a…
objectives: Connect product capability to user behavior, user outcome, stakeholder outcome, and public consequence without assuming causality.
Define a baseline, observable leading and lagging measures, collection method, comparison window, and uncertainty.
Pair success measures with accessibility, equity, privacy, security, reliability, and burden guardrails.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Chain
steps.instruction:
debug case — A team targets engagement growth without a baseline, causal path, burden guardrail, or threshold for stopping a harmful direction. The debug variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Connect product capability to user behavior, user outcome, stakeholder outcome, and public consequence without assuming causality.

Inspect the Outcome Chain trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Chain.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for connect product capability to user behavior, user outcome, stakeholder outcome, and public consequence without assuming causality. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Chain, keep Outcome Chain connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: For Outcome Chain, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Chain, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Outcome Chain precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Chain, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A team targets engagement growth without a baseline, causal path, burden guardrail, or threshold for stopping a harmful direction. The debug variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Connect product capability to user behavior, user outcome, stakeholder outcome, and public consequence without assuming causality.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Chain, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Shipping a capability directly proves the intended real-world outcome.

stimulus.title: Outcome Chain case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A team targets engagement growth without a baseline, causal path, burden guardrail, or threshold for stopping a harmful direction. The debug variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Connect product capability to user behavior, user outcome, stakeholder outcome, and public consequence without assuming causality.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Shipping a capability directly proves the intended real-world outcome.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Connect product capability to user behavior, user outcome, stakeholder outcome, and public consequence without assuming causality. Artifact under review: measurable outcome and non-goal contract.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the inspect the failure record evidence boundary.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Outcome Chain, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

content.title: Evidence defense
